description_long: This is a single-story house with a prominent gable roof and a large covered front porch. The porch features decorative railings and steps leading up to a central entry door, flanked by columns. The exterior walls are simple, with a few symmetrically placed windows on each side, including double-hung and single-pane styles. The roof is steeply pitched and extends well beyond the walls, providing ample shade to the porch area. The house sits on a raised foundation with a lattice skirt, and the overall design is modest yet inviting, typical of Craftsman or bungalow styles. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood, with glass windows and metal hardware.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, large covered porch, decorative railings, and symmetrically placed windows. The design is modest and inviting, with a raised foundation and Craftsman-style details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide covered porch, central steps, decorative railings, and main entry door.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gable roof, two windows (one double, one single), and the porch extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, no visible windows or doors, and the roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows and a partial view of the porch and front columns.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, wide covered porch, decorative railings, and supporting columns
